popularStory.headline: Guillaume Ier de Dampierre (1130-1161)
popularStory.description:
Guillaume (†>1173) Seigneur de Dampierre sur Aube, de Saint Dizier et de Moeslains, est le fils de Guy Ier († 1151), vicomte de Troyes, seigneur de Dampierre X Helvide de Baudement

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Dampierre II於1196年出生在法國德 艾斯特奧布達皮時，他的父親Guy II de Dampierre31歲，母親Mathilde Ire de Bourbon31歲。他於1224年之前與Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1231年9月3日在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登豪-馬內沙吉迪。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Dampierre II was born in 1196, in Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, his father, Guy II de Dampierre, was 31 and his mother, Mathilde Ire de Bourbon, was 31. He married Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre before 1224. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 3 September 1231, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Saint-Dizier, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Dampierre II est né en 1196, à Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, son père, Guy II de Dampierre, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mathilde Ire de Bourbon, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre avant 1224. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 3 septembre 1231, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Dizier, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Dampierre II 1196 in Dampierre, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy II de Dampierre 31 und seine Mutter Mathilde Ire de Bourbon 31. Er hat vor 1224 Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 3. September 1231 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Saint-Dizier, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre prima del 1224. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Dampierre IIが1196年にフランスグランド エストアウベダンパエアで生まれた時，父Guy II de Dampierreは31歳，母Mathilde Ire de Bourbonは31歳であった。1224年以前にMarguerite de Constantinopel-Flandreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1231年9月3日に故郷で35歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンハウテ-マルンサイント-ディズイエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Dampierre II(이)가 1196년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 댐피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy II de Dampierre(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde Ire de Bourbon(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1224년 이전 Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1231년 9월 3일 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 하테-마니 세인트-디지어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Dampierre II nasceu em 1196, em Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Guy II de Dampierre, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde Ire de Bourbon, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre antes 1224. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de setembro de 1231, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Dizier, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Dampierre II родился в 1196 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Guy II de Dampierre было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde Ire de Bourbon, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre перед 1224 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 3 сентября 1231 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-дизиир, хауте-марн, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Dampierre II nació en 1196, en Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Guy II de Dampierre, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mathilde Ire de Bourbon, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Constantinopel-Flandre antes de 1224. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 3 de septiembre de 1231, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Dizier, Haute-Marne, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
